scripts.build:register: npx mjml register/register.mjml -o register/register.html --config.allowIncludes true --config.includePath . --config.minify true
scripts.build:register-reply: npx mjml register/register-reply.mjml -o register/register-reply.html --config.allowIncludes true --config.includePath . --config.minify true
scripts.build:contact: npx mjml contact/contact.mjml -o contact/contact.html --config.allowIncludes true --config.includePath . --config.minify true
scripts.build:package: npx mjml package/package.mjml -o package/package.html --config.allowIncludes true --config.includePath . --config.minify true
scripts.build:service: npx mjml service/service.mjml -o service/service.html --config.allowIncludes true --config.includePath . --config.minify true
scripts.build:voucher: npx mjml voucher/voucher.mjml -o voucher/voucher.html --config.allowIncludes true --config.includePath . --config.minify true
scripts.build: npm run build:register && npm run build:register-reply && npm run build:contact && npm run build:package && npm run build:service && npm run build:voucher
